overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves from a covered pedestrian walkway through an open plaza and across busy intersections, with wet streets reflecting the vibrant cyan and magenta neon signage. The clip includes a timelapse sequence of traffic at an intersection before continuing along a sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian shopping walkway with neon vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered commercial walkway, passing by illuminated shop fronts and food vendors on the left

notable_agents.action: construction worker in yellow hard hat sweeping the pavement near a shop entrance

entered.detail: overhead concrete and metal canopy covering the pedestrian path
bright cyan and red neon signs advertising various businesses
modern glass facade building with illuminated interior levels
large cylindrical concrete columns supporting the overhead structure
multi-level highway structure with glowing edge lighting
tall towers with illuminated windows and neon accents visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian walkway with wet concrete reflecting the vibrant neon signage of shops lining the left side. The player walks forward beneath an overhead concrete structure, passing construction workers and food vendors, with massive futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance beyond the elevated highway ramps.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm trees and parked motorcycles

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza area with palm trees and wider space

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through an open plaza area, navigating around concrete planters and parked motorcycles

notable_agents.action: futuristic motorcycles parked in a cluster near the building entrance

entered.detail: group of illuminated palm trees in concrete planters providing greenery to the plaza
cluster of futuristic motorcycles with glowing red accent lights
large rectangular concrete blocks containing vegetation

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene transitions to an open plaza with palm trees and parked motorcycles. The space feels more expansive with less overhead coverage, revealing more of the surrounding commercial buildings and the elevated highway structure above.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with crosswalks and traffic

events.description: approaches intersection crosswalk as vehicles pass by on the street
turns slightly to navigate around corner of intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at an intersection, moving from the plaza toward the opposite sidewalk while avoiding traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: large paved intersection with marked crosswalks and traffic signals
large digital advertisement screen on building facade
illuminated traffic lights showing red for pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The player crosses a busy intersection with wet asphalt reflecting the city lights. Vehicles pass through the crossing as the player navigates toward the corner, where a large digital billboard becomes visible on the right side of the frame.

events.description: camera stops walking and begins stationary timelapse recording of traffic

agents.ego_description: standing stationary at the intersection corner observing the flow of traffic in timelapse mode

entered.detail: tall vertical digital display showing a woman's face with glowing yellow text
green illuminated directional signs suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at the intersection corner and captures a timelapse sequence, showing streaks of light from passing vehicles. A prominent vertical holographic billboard dominates the right side of the frame, while overhead traffic signs glow green against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk along commercial street with neon storefronts

events.description: resumes walking and enters narrower sidewalk corridor between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along a city sidewalk next to tall buildings with neon signage, moving toward a narrower alley section

entered.detail: paved pedestrian walkway with red painted curb edge
tall commercial structures with bright pink and cyan neon signage
dimly lit passage between high-rise buildings leading deeper into the city

segments.scene_description: Resuming movement, the player walks along a concrete sidewalk beside the street, passing into a narrower corridor between tall buildings adorned with vibrant neon signage. The environment becomes more enclosed as the player approaches a darker alleyway ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban walkway into a sprawling neon-lit plaza before narrowing back into a dense city corridor. It begins beneath a concrete overhead structure where wet pavement reflects the vibrant signage of nearby shops and food vendors, with massive skyscrapers looming in the distance. As the camera emerges from the cover, the environment opens into an expansive plaza filled with palm trees and parked motorcycles beneath the shadow of an elevated highway. The scene then shifts toward a busy intersection of reflective asphalt, pausing at the corner for a timelapse of streaking vehicle lights beneath a towering holographic billboard and glowing green traffic signs. Finally, the camera resumes its forward motion along a concrete sidewalk, moving away from the open intersection and into a narrower, more enclosed corridor of tall buildings that leads toward a dark alleyway.
